builtin_roles.name: 管理员
builtin_roles.seed_line: app/core/init_app.py:206-208 (Role.create(name="管理员", desc="管理员角色"))

route_prefix_evidence: app/api/v1/__init__.py mounts depts_router at prefix='/dept' under v1_router
facts.token_header_evidence: app/core/dependency.py:13 — async def is_authed(cls, token: str = Header(..., description='token验证')). FastAPI maps the parameter name 'token' to a request header named 'token' (case-insensitive). NO 'Bearer' scheme prefix — the header value is the raw JWT string.

depts_module_specific.endpoints_evidence: app/api/v1/depts/depts.py + app/api/v1/__init__.py (depts_router mounted at '/dept' with DependPermission)

is_deleted.type: boolean field via BaseModel, used for soft delete

depts_module_specific.soft_delete_evidence: app/controllers/dept.py:78-83 — delete_dept sets is_deleted=True and removes DeptClosure rows where descendant=dept_id

closure_table.rebuild_on_parent_change_evidence: app/controllers/dept.py:67-74 — update_dept deletes ancestor=dept_id and descendant=dept_id rows then rebuilds via update_dept_closure
